title: ALL processed data of quantification of Total, viable and VC population
author: TRIGUEROS Sylvain
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: Processed data set of qPCR, PMA-qPCR and agar enumeration of the article. These data are sorted according to the D2O concentration used (0%, 25%, 50% or 75%), and according to the incubation time
steps_raw: Processed data set of qPCR, PMA-qPCR and agar enumeration of the article. These data are sorted according to the D2O concentration used (0%, 25%, 50% or 75%), and according to the incubation time
